ledger.payableNotReceivedHint: Not received by you—payable to us.

ledger.fullBalanceHint: Leave empty to request the full available balance
ledger.queryPlaceholder: Enter your query or dispute reason...

profile.title: پروفائل

profile.aiFeaturesDescription: AI-powered application summaries are available for all roles. Open any application from the Applications list and use the AI File Summary section to generate or view an AI summary with applicant profile, loan details, strengths, and risks.

formConfiguration.useSectionsHint: Switch to product-embedded config (Section N, Field N) stored in Loan Products.
formConfiguration.noDocumentsYet: No documents yet. Add one below.
formConfiguration.selectProductHint: Select a product above to configure its form requirements.
